name: chophub
description: Nigerian food marketplace — vendors list catfish, frozen chicken, cooked African foods; customers order via Monnify.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.build: bun run build:api && bun run build:web
scripts.build:web: cd apps/web && bun x vite build
